services.title: Our Services
services.s2_desc: Spatial curation with materiality and light.
services.s3_desc: Large-scale masterplans and public space design.

houseModern.title: Modern Minimalist House
houseModern.description: A 2-story modern minimalist house with clean white facade and warm wood accents. This design prioritizes natural lighting and good air circulation.
houseModern.challenge: Creating a modern design that remains harmonious with the green surroundings.
houseModern.solution: We used natural materials like wood on the ceiling and decorative screen to blend with nature.

luxuryHome.title: Luxury Family Home
luxuryHome.description: A luxurious family home with elegant decorative patterned wall. Equipped with 2-car carport and beautiful front garden.
luxuryHome.challenge: Designing a luxury home that remains comfortable for family in a lush environment.
luxuryHome.solution: Design with decorative wall as focal point, plus warm exterior lighting.

livingRoom.title: Contemporary Living Room
livingRoom.description: A contemporary living room with modern grey sofa and textured wall. Equipped with artwork panel and perfect lighting.
livingRoom.challenge: Creating an elegant living room that remains comfortable for family.
livingRoom.solution: Combination of neutral colors with textured wall and artwork as focal point.

staircaseDining.title: Staircase & Dining Area
staircaseDining.description: A modern staircase with glass railing and wooden steps. Integrated with minimalist and elegant dining area.
staircaseDining.challenge: Designing a safe yet aesthetic staircase that doesn't make the space feel cramped.
staircaseDining.solution: Glass railing provides an open feel while wooden steps add warmth.

about.label: About
about.title: Creating spaces that inspire life
about.description: DROPINK Studio is a premium architecture firm focused on meaningful and sustainable design. We believe every space has a story to tell.

testimonials.title: What Clients Say
testimonials.t1_text: DROPINK transformed our vision into reality. The result exceeded our expectations.
testimonials.t2_text: Professional, creative, and incredibly detail-oriented. Highly recommended.

contact.whatsapp_message: Hello DROPINK, I'd like to discuss my project.
